payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark-stained wooden (or wood-veneered) cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical rectangular profile, matte finish with faint wood grain and a minor scuff near the bottom; door fills most of the crop and is slightly edge-cropped on the sides — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.
